hot_cache.note: All Go files must import github.com/falke-ai-circuit/hermes-remote. The old falke-remote path was from the initial scaffold.
Not a system package — downloaded from go.dev. Use export PATH=/opt/data/go/bin:$PATH before building.

hot_cache.topic: gorilla/websocket v1.5.3 is the only external dependency
hot_cache.note: Zero other dependencies. The binary should stay minimal — add new deps only with justification.

files.internal/protocol/messages.go: All JSON message types, Envelope, 25 command types, 9 error codes, helper functions
files.internal/protocol/websocket.go: WebSocket dial, listen, TLS config, cert fingerprint
files.internal/protocol/server.go: TLS server wrapper with WebSocket upgrade handler
files.internal/protocol/binary.go: Binary frame encoding for large payloads (>1MB)
files.internal/server/server.go: Multi-session WebSocket server, HTTP API endpoints
files.internal/agent/agent.go: Agent loop, connection management, command dispatch
files.internal/platform/platform.go: Platform interface (shell, fs, screen, input, system)

recent_changes.summary: Initial scaffold — protocol, server, agent, platform, CLI, plugin. Builds and vets cleanly.
